evals.prompt: The API call in my repository throws a DioException when the server returns 401. How should I handle this?
evals.expected_output: Catch DioException in infrastructure, map to Left(UnauthorizedFailure()), return Either<Failure, T>, never rethrow to UI

evals.prompt: My BLoC has a try/catch block that catches Exception and emits an error state with e.toString(). Is this the right approach?
evals.expected_output: No — try/catch belongs in Infrastructure only. BLoC should call repository returning Either, then fold() to emit Failure state. Remove try/catch from BLoC.

evals.prompt: Create a failure type for when the product is out of stock, with a user-facing message.
evals.expected_output: @freezed Failure class with OutOfStockFailure case, failureMessage returning TRObject/localized string, in domain/failures/

should_not_trigger: Add a retry button to the error screen widget
How do I show a SnackBar when an error occurs?
Write a widget test for the error state
Set up Sentry for crash reporting
